resultList.dtldesc: Experience a comfortable and professional urban lifestyle with this well-maintained 2 BHK apartment in Rajkham Akash Ganga, Pallikaranai. This residence offers a stable living environment in one of Chennais most established residential neighbourhoods, making it an ideal choice for professionals and small families. Positioned within a secure community that prioritises maintenance and convenience, the apartment is ready for immediate occupancy. With its strategic location near key educational and healthcare hubs, this property provides a reliable and high-quality foundation for a sophisticated life in South Chennai.Property SpecificationsThis substantial residence offers a super area of 938 sq. ft and is situated on the 3rd floor of a 4-storey building. The apartment features an east-facing orientation, ensuring ample natural light and positive energy flow throughout the day. The layout includes two well-proportioned bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, and a private balcony that offers a pleasant view of the surrounding garden or park. The unit is offered in a semi-furnished condition, featuring essential fittings and quality vitrified flooring that maintains a professional aesthetic. With an age of construction between 10 to 15 years, the property remains in excellent condition, reflecting the enduring build quality of Rajkham Builders.FacilitiesResidents of Rajkham Akash Ganga benefit from an extensive range of facilities designed to provide a secure and convenient residential experience. The project offers 24-hour water supply and a robust power backup system to ensure an uninterrupted daily routine. Essential amenities include a gymnasium, a dedicated kids play area, an indoor games room, and a multipurpose hall for community events. Security is a primary focus, with CCTV surveillance, a gated entry and exit, and professional maintenance staff. Additional conveniences such as reserved parking, visitor parking, laundry services, and efficient waste disposal systems further contribute to the professional and hassle-free atmosphere of the community.LocalityPallikaranai is a premier residential neighbourhood in South Chennai, renowned for its strategic connectivity and proximity to the citys major IT corridors. The property is ideally located near several prominent landmarks, including the National Institute of Ocean Technology and Jerusalem Engineering College. Families will appreciate the closeness to reputable institutions like San Academy and Asan Memorial College of Arts  Science. For healthcare requirements, Dr. Kamakshi Memorial Hospital is within easy reach, while Shanmuga Mall provides a convenient option for shopping and leisure. This well-serviced locality ensures that all essential amenities and public transport options are just a short distance away, facilitating a highly efficient lifestyle.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover comfortable independent living in the well-established locality of Avadi, Chennai, with this thoughtfully designed 2 BHK house. Situated close to Avadi Railway Station and the Greater Corporation Office, the property offers a combination of convenience, connectivity, and peaceful residential surroundings. Ideal for small families, working professionals, and homebuyers seeking an independent residence, this ready-to-move home provides a practical layout and a promising location.::::Property Specifications::::This semi-furnished independent house is built on a well-planned layout with a super built-up area of approximately 1000 sq. ft. and a carpet area of 900 sq. ft. Developed as a G+1 structure, the property offers efficient space utilisation while ensuring privacy and comfort. The home comprises two spacious bedrooms, two bathrooms, and two balconies, making it suitable for modern family living.::::The property features separate living and dining areas, allowing for a well-organised interior layout. The kitchen is designed in a functional format with adequate workspace and storage provisions. Granite flooring throughout the house adds durability, elegance, and ease of maintenance. The residence is semi-furnished, enabling buyers to customise interiors according to their personal preferences while benefiting from essential fittings already in place.::::The house is north-facing and Vastu compliant, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere with good ventilation and natural light. Overlooking a park, the property enjoys a pleasant environment and open views, enhancing the overall living experience.::::Facilities::::The residence offers essential amenities required for comfortable everyday living. It includes one open parking space for vehicle accommodation and benefits from 24-hour water availability. The independent layout provides privacy and flexibility for homeowners. Being a newly constructed and ready-to-move property, the house requires minimal immediate maintenance and offers the advantage of modern construction standards.::::Locality::::Located in the TNHB area of Avadi, Chennai, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major parts of the city. Avadi Railway Station and the Greater Corporation Office are situated nearby, making daily commuting highly convenient. Essential facilities such as schools, hospitals, supermarkets, banks, and public transport options are available within approximately 100 metres of the property. Avadi is a rapidly developing residential hub known for its established infrastructure, educational institutions, defence establishments, and strong transport network. Its strategic location and growing urban development make it an attractive destination for both homebuyers and investors seeking long-term value.
